name: Vegetable Spaghetti Sauce Ff (Rbfv65a)
recipeIngredient: Dry red wine with lots of body
Hot red pepper flakes or Tabasco
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop all vegetables and have them ready to cook.
2. Pour about 1 oz of white wine into a large pot.
3. When the wine is boiling, add the carrots and stir vigorously until they begin to soften.
4. Add small amounts of wine as needed, allowing the bottom to become somewhat dry without burning.
5. Stir continuously and add each vegetable in turn until all are in the pot.
6. Add garlic last and cook for about 30 seconds.
7. After all vegetables are added, incorporate tomatoes and tomato paste (use fresh if unavailable).
8. Wash cans with a small amount of red wine and add to the pot.
9. Add basil, rosemary (ground in a spice mill), oregano, cilantro, chicken base (or bouillon cubes), black pepper, and red pepper flakes; stir and cover the pot.
10. Turn heat down until the sauce is barely boiling, then adjust seasonings as needed.
11. Cover and heat for about one half hour.
12. Puree the mixture with a food mill if desired.
13. Pour over spaghetti and enjoy! Save some of the red wine to serve alongside.
